utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh , please . This is so your fault .

emotion_cause.span: 3_Carol never threw me out of a room before you came along .

utterances.speaker: Susan
utterances.text: How , how is this my fault ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Look , Carol never threw me out of a room before you came along .

emotion_cause.span: 3_Carol never threw me out of a room before you came along .

utterances.speaker: Susan
utterances.text: Yeah ? Well , there is a lot of things Carol never did before I came along .

emotion_cause.span: 3_Carol never threw me out of a room before you came along .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You trying to be clever ? A funny lady ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_You trying to be clever ? A funny lady ?

utterances.speaker: Susan
utterances.text: You know what your problem is ? You are so threatened by me .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Oh , I am threatened by you ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Hey , hey , ok , all right , that is it ! Get in here . Come on .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: My god , you guys , I do not believe you .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: There are children coming into the world in this very building and your negative fighting noises are not the first thing they should be hearing .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: So just stop all the yelling , just stop it !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Do not make me do this again , I do not like my voice like this .

emotion_cause.span: 13_Do not make me do this again , I do not like my voice like this .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Ok , who wants to hear something ironic ?
